productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Navy Blue Shoes
description: Classic sneakers from numero uno, referenced from the all-sport lifestyle for the cosmopolitan male. An icon of casual dressing, wear this with a straightforward combination of jeans and a favourite tee. Upper Synthetic leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing Reinforced overlay on the heel cup and toe box for abrasion free comfort Central lacing system for a customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for instep comfort Mesh lining for breathability Branding on the side, heel and tongue Midsole PU midsole with foxing for shock absorption and all day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with circular lugs and waffle patterned grooves for grip and traction shoe care Wipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
